positive: A retro 80s synthwave illustration featuring a stylized chrome sports car driving toward a neon grid sunset over a calm ocean. The palette must be dominated by magenta, cyan, and teal. Incorporate palm trees and VHS glitch aesthetic. Pop art, vaporwave style, high contrast digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
